energyRt 0.70.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Roadmap
    • Installation
    • Solver backends
    • Model bricks
    • Time resolution
    • UTOPIA I: building the model
    • UTOPIA II: running scenarios
    • Workflow
    • autoplot()
  • News

UTOPIA electricity load shape

Source: R/utopia-data.R
utopia_demand.Rd

A deterministic relative electricity-load shape by slice, for both teaching calendars (replaces the vignette's former random load curve). utopia_profiles() / the vignette scale it by a region's annual demand and the slice shares to get energy per slice.

Usage

utopia_demand

Format

A data.frame with columns calendar (utopia_m12h24/utopia_seasons), slice and load (relative, mean ~1).

See also

utopia_profiles(), utopia_weather, utopia_stock

Examples

utopia_demand
#>           calendar   slice   load
#> 1     utopia_s4h24 WIN_h00 0.8400
#> 2     utopia_s4h24 SPR_h00 0.6300
#> 3     utopia_s4h24 SUM_h00 0.7700
#> 4     utopia_s4h24 AUT_h00 0.6300
#> 5     utopia_s4h24 WIN_h01 0.7800
#> 6     utopia_s4h24 SPR_h01 0.5850
#> 7     utopia_s4h24 SUM_h01 0.7150
#> 8     utopia_s4h24 AUT_h01 0.5850
#> 9     utopia_s4h24 WIN_h02 0.7440
#> 10    utopia_s4h24 SPR_h02 0.5580
#> 11    utopia_s4h24 SUM_h02 0.6820
#> 12    utopia_s4h24 AUT_h02 0.5580
#> 13    utopia_s4h24 WIN_h03 0.7200
#> 14    utopia_s4h24 SPR_h03 0.5400
#> 15    utopia_s4h24 SUM_h03 0.6600
#> 16    utopia_s4h24 AUT_h03 0.5400
#> 17    utopia_s4h24 WIN_h04 0.7440
#> 18    utopia_s4h24 SPR_h04 0.5580
#> 19    utopia_s4h24 SUM_h04 0.6820
#> 20    utopia_s4h24 AUT_h04 0.5580

#> 22    utopia_s4h24 SPR_h05 0.6120
#> 23    utopia_s4h24 SUM_h05 0.7480
#> 24    utopia_s4h24 AUT_h05 0.6120
